name: Salesforce
production_method: OAuth-connected Salesforce REST/Bulk APIs via FastAPI backend
description: Simulated account, opportunity, activity, and contact data for the CRO workflow.

name: ERP / Capacity
production_method: Authenticated ERP or MES adapter that normalizes work-center capacity and backlog
description: Simulated available hours, constraint notes, and lead-time pressure by facility.

name: SAM.gov
production_method: Public contract API ingestion through the monitor and backend cache
description: Contract award and solicitation signals shaped for account scoring.

name: Email / Calendar
production_method: Microsoft Graph or Google Workspace OAuth with user-scoped permissions
description: Future relationship activity, meeting recency, and stakeholder coverage signals.

name: HubSpot
production_method: Private app token or OAuth-backed HubSpot CRM API adapter
description: Alternative CRM source for companies that use HubSpot instead of Salesforce.

name: NetSuite / Generic ERP
production_method: SuiteTalk REST or client-specific ERP connector through FastAPI
description: Future order, backlog, shipment, inventory, and capacity source.

name: Public News / Market Signals
production_method: Python monitor ingestion of RSS, web pages, APIs, and validated extracted signals
description: Static market events that become validated scoring signals in the demo.
